use_cases: Hero landing page for music artist or entertainment portfolios
Retro-themed startup landing pages with nostalgic appeal
Media and content creator portfolio hero sections
ai_summary: A VHS-style hero section featuring glitch text effects that evoke retro video tape aesthetics. The component creates an animated, distorted text display with hover and scroll-triggered animations, perfect for music, media, and entertainment-themed landing pages seeking a nostalgic 90s vibe.
